base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of map_curl_corner — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. Scroll-corner curl/roll detail — accessory graphic for map-interaction UI. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
